name: Belgium
style_of_play: Possession-oriented with creative midfielders and a focus on unlocking defenses through central combinations.
weaknesses: can lack width without overlapping fullbacks
tactical_summary: Build through De Bruyne and the midfield triangle; striker holds up play while wingers isolate fullbacks. Drop into a compact 4-4-2 without the ball.
why_it_matters: Belgium's creative midfield can unlock tight defensive blocks with a single incisive pass or set-piece delivery.
injury_news: Placeholder — monitor key midfielder and striker fitness updates.
